answer:
Paygent is an AI agent monetization and cost-tracking platform that allows developers to implement usage-based billing, metering, and gating via API and SDKs [1][2][3].

Paygent offers a free tier that includes 100,000 events per month, 1 year of data retention, and email support [1]. You can access this by signing up at their website to obtain a `pg_live_` API key, which enables full programmatic access to plan configuration and user management [4][5].

You can self-serve by submitting plan structures via the API:

```http
POST https://api.paygent.to/api/v1/config/plans
Authorization: Bearer pg_live_...
Content-Type: application/json
```

The configuration defines your usage limits and cost rates, allowing you to gate AI model access (e.g., restricting free users to specific models) [6][4][3].
